meta.title: Free Image Converter — Free Online Image Converter
meta.description: Free Image Converter — convert images to {{formats}} directly in your browser, for free.

simple.label: Simple
simple.hint: Drop your images, pick one or more formats, and convert — no fuss.

fast.label: Fast
fast.hint: Instant conversion in the browser, no upload wait.

free.label: Free
free.hint: No sign-up, no limits, and no cost.

secure.label: 100% secure
secure.hint: Your files never leave your device — everything runs locally.

formatSelector.title: Target formats
formatSelector.description: Select one or more output formats. Click again to deselect.

dropzone.title: Source images
dropzone.description: Drag files or click to select. Accepted formats: {{formats}}.
dropzone.multipleHint: You can add multiple files at once
dropzone.privacy: No data is sent to servers. All conversion happens locally in your browser.

errors.unsupportedFiles: Some files were ignored because they are not a supported format.
errors.avifUnsupported: Your browser does not support AVIF conversion. Try other formats or update your browser.
errors.heicDecodeFailed: Could not read the HEIC file. Try another browser or convert the file before uploading.
errors.previewFailed: Could not load the image preview.
